plugin.name: NEKO Live
plugin.description: Roast first-time Bilibili viewers from nickname and avatar during live streams.
plugin.short_description: First danmaku triggers avatar and nickname roast.
panel.title: NEKO Live
panel.subtitle: Live room setup, roast controls, summary, profiles, and developer sandbox
panel.store.disabled: Plugin store is disabled; viewer profiles will not persist.
panel.control.title: Pacing & Safety
panel.room.title: Live Room Settings
panel.room.connectedHint: NEKO Live is receiving events for this live room.
panel.room.disconnectedHint: Set a live room ID, then start listening.
panel.modules.name: Module
panel.modules.renderError: This module failed to render and was isolated; the rest of the panel is unaffected.
panel.auth.title: Bilibili Login
panel.auth.scanHint: Scan with the Bilibili app, then tap Check Login
panel.auth.refreshHint: Click the QR code to refresh
panel.messages.uidRequired: Lookup a UID first, or fill an override UID.

panel.profiles.title: Viewer Profiles
panel.dev.title: Sandbox Input
panel.dev.switch.title: Developer mode
panel.dev.lookup.title: UID Lookup
panel.dev.lookup.empty: Enter a UID or Bilibili space URL, then lookup results will appear here.
panel.dev.lookup.emailUnavailable: Not public / not provided by API
panel.dev.emitter.title: Simulated Danmaku Input
panel.dev.emitter.usingLookup: Using the UID lookup result as the default identity.
panel.dev.emitter.noLookup: No lookup result yet. Empty fields will use the built-in preset.
panel.dev.emitter.overrideHint: Empty fields use lookup results first, then the built-in preset.
panel.audit.title: Recent Audit
panel.columns.name: Name
actions.update_config.label: Save settings
actions.pause.label: Pause
actions.resume.label: Resume
actions.clear_queue.label: Clear queue

actions.connect_live_room.label: Start listening
actions.disconnect_live_room.label: Stop listening
entries.update_config.name: Update NEKO Live settings
entries.update_config.description: Update live mode, switches, and safety settings.
entries.pause_roast.name: Pause roast
entries.resume_roast.name: Resume roast
entries.resume_roast.description: Clear the queue and reset safety state.
entries.clear_queue.name: Clear queue
entries.trigger_idle_hosting.name: Trigger idle hosting
entries.trigger_idle_hosting.description: Manually trigger one idle-hosting pass when NEKO is solo streaming and idle.
entries.trigger_warmup_hosting.name: Trigger warmup hosting
entries.trigger_warmup_hosting.descripti: Manually trigger one solo-stream opening host beat when NEKO has just started.
entries.trigger_active_engagement.name: Trigger active engagement
entries.trigger_active_engagement.descri: Manually trigger one solo-stream active engagement beat when NEKO is in a quiet moment.
entries.set_live_room.name: Set live room
entries.set_live_room.description: Set the Bilibili live room ID NEKO Live should listen to.
entries.connect_live_room.name: Start live room listening
entries.connect_live_room.description: Enable the NEKO Live live ingest state.
entries.disconnect_live_room.name: Stop live room listening
entries.disconnect_live_room.description: Stop the NEKO Live live ingest state.
entries.submit_viewer_event.name: Submit viewer event
entries.submit_viewer_event.description: Submit a UID/URL test event from developer sandbox.
entries.submit_live_event.name: Submit live event
entries.submit_live_event.description: Submit a normalized live danmaku event.
panel.room.lookupOk: Room found. Confirm the details, then start listening.
panel.room.lookupFailed: No usable room was found. Check the room ID.
panel.liveStatusSummary.title: Ready Check
panel.liveStatusReason.ready: NEKO can see the room and output is enabled.
panel.liveStatusReason.dry_run: Dry run is on, so NEKO will not send real output.
panel.liveStatusReason.cooldown: NEKO is waiting for the cooldown.
panel.liveStatusReason.safety_degraded: Safety guard is degraded; check recent errors.
panel.liveStatusReason.output_channel_un: The output channel is unavailable; NEKO cannot push real output.
panel.liveStatusReason.all_ready: Live room, ingest, and safety checks are ready.
panel.liveModeRoleHint.companion: The streamer leads; NEKO is the partner and fills gaps with low interruption.
panel.liveModeRoleHint.solo_host: Only NEKO is on stage; NEKO is receiving viewers and holding the room.
panel.liveState.title: Live state
panel.liveStateReason.quiet_activity_gap: No new interaction for a short while.
panel.liveStateReason.low_activity: The room is quieter; NEKO is waiting for a good moment.
panel.liveStateReason.no_recent_activity: No recent interaction for a while.
panel.liveStateReason.blocked_by_live_st: The ready check is blocking NEKO.
panel.idleHostingCandidate.true: Solo stream is idle; NEKO is eligible for idle hosting.
panel.idleHostingCandidate.false: Idle hosting is not eligible right now.
panel.idleHostingStatus.title: Idle hosting
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.eligible: NEKO can fill the quiet moment now.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.not_candi: The room is not in a solo idle moment.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.minimum_i: NEKO just tried idle hosting and is waiting before speaking again.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.auto_disa: Idle hosting is paused after repeated failures.
panel.idleHostingStatus.reason.solo_idle: Solo stream is idle and NEKO can prepare an idle hosting line.
panel.speechExplanation.title: Why NEKO is quiet
panel.speechExplanation.summary.waiting_: Waiting for a good moment to speak
panel.speechExplanation.summary.recently: The recent event did not output
panel.speechExplanation.reason.dry_run: Dry run is enabled, so output is not pushed.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.idle_host: Solo stream is idle and ready for idle hosting.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.quiet_act: The room has been quiet for a short while.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.no_recent: There has been no recent activity.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.waiting_f: Waiting for a viewer reply or an idle hosting slot.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.recently_: The last event was skipped by policy.
panel.advanced.title: Advanced Status
actions.lookup_live_room.label: Check Room
entries.lookup_live_room.name: Check live room status
entries.lookup_live_room.description: Check the title, host, and live status for a Bilibili live room ID.
actions.clear_sandbox_data.label: Clear sandbox records
entries.clear_sandbox_data.name: Clear sandbox records
entries.clear_sandbox_data.description: Clear temporary developer sandbox records and avatar preview cache without affecting viewer profiles.
panel.dev.developerModeDisabled: Developer mode is off; sandbox lookup, simulated danmaku, and chat developer tools are unavailable.
panel.fields.oncePerUidHint: NEKO roasts each viewer's entrance once; later danmaku can still get normal replies.
panel.dm.desc: Coming later: Bilibili DMs — let the cat read and reply by your rules.
panel.automation.desc: Coming later: browser, keyboard/mouse, and public-data workflows for the cat to run automations.
panel.storage.title: Profile Storage
panel.storage.dirPlaceholder: Default = plugin data dir; or an absolute path
panel.storage.hint: New profiles go to the new location; existing ones are not migrated. Blank = plugin default dir.
panel.storage.disabled: Custom storage is temporarily disabled; profiles currently use the plugin default folder.
panel.storage.notWritable: Current folder isn't writable; temporarily fell back to the default. Check the path or permissions.
actions.pick_folder.label: Choose folder
panel.storage.browsed: Path filled in — click "Save location" to apply
entries.pick_folder.name: Choose folder
entries.pick_folder.description: Open the OS native folder picker and return the chosen directory (used by the panel).
panel.interaction.currentDecision.title: Current speaking decision
panel.interaction.currentDecision.subtit: Shows why NEKO spoke, waited, skipped, or only dry-ran the latest event.
panel.liveDirector.reason.recent_activit: Recent activity is enough; NEKO should answer, not force a topic.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_warmup: Solo stream has just started; NEKO may open the room.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_quiet: Solo stream is quiet; NEKO may create one light topic.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_idle: Solo stream is idle; NEKO may cover the silence.
panel.liveDirector.reason.solo_idle_read: Solo stream is idle; NEKO may cover the silence.
panel.liveDirector.reason.recent_danmaku: NEKO just replied to danmaku; wait before active engagement.
panel.liveDirector.reason.auto_disabled: Auto hosting is disabled after repeated failures.
panel.interaction.module.avatarRoast.des: Comments on the viewer avatar, ID, and first line together. Each viewer only gets one entrance roast.
panel.interaction.module.danmakuResponse: Follow-up danmaku from the same UID is no longer skipped; NEKO replies to the current line without repeating avatar or ID entrance templates.
panel.interaction.module.warmupHosting.d: Opening line for solo stream before the room has any recent activity. It should feel like starting a stream, not filling dead air.
panel.interaction.module.idleHosting.des: Short filler lines when nobody is talking. Only for solo stream, and it must not pretend viewers said something.
panel.interaction.module.activeEngagemen: Conservative solo-stream engagement beat for quiet moments. Use it to test whether NEKO can create one replyable topic without sounding pushy.
panel.activeEngagementCandidate.true: Ready for a light engagement beat
panel.activeEngagementCandidate.false: Not a good moment for active engagement
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.elig: Solo stream is quiet and NEKO may create one small topic.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.defe: Active engagement is deferred while danmaku response and idle hosting are validated first.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.not_: Active engagement v0 only serves solo stream.
Active engagement waits for quiet, not engaged or fully idle moments.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.mini: Active engagement is waiting for its minimum interval.
panel.activeEngagementStatus.reason.live: Live status is not ready for output.
panel.speechExplanation.reason.solo_stre: Solo stream has just started; NEKO may open the room.
panel.soloTestReadiness.title: Solo stream readiness
